_description: Room-to-map reference. Maps room names from data/rooms.py to their map_id in the game.
_how_generated: Primary: found room's physical exit in maps_data.json (approach 1). Secondary: looked up exit partner's dest_map (approach 2). NR rooms inherit from base room. Some manual annotations from rooms.py hex comments.
_notes: Room names in room_data do NOT correspond to map IDs - they are internal identifiers.
Multiple rooms can share the same map_id (e.g., WoB and WoR versions, or multiple logical rooms on one physical map).
Unresolved rooms only have virtual/event tile exits that could not be traced to physical maps.
map_name comes from the game's location name display system (some maps have empty names).
